# Unlikely Friendship

> [!tip] 👑 Event · Cost: **0** · Leadership

![[16007.png]]

---

Play only if you control a unique character with the **_Silvan_** trait and another unique character with the **_Dwarf_** trait.
**Action:** Draw 1 card and add 1 resource to the resource pool of a hero you control.

---

> *...folk that saw them pass marvelled to see such companions…*
> — The Return of the King
